person_name: Gaius Fabricius Luscinus, Roman consul and envoy to Pyrrhus (early 3rd century BCE)
person_name_full: Gaius Fabricius Luscinus, Roman consul and envoy to Pyrrhus (early 3rd century BCE)
notes: Roman consul and envoy known for his integrity and refusal to engage in treachery during the Pyrrhic War.

docs.title: Roman History, Book Book 9
docs.author: Cassius Dio
docs.excerpt: For I see that you are a thoroughly upright and reputable man. Accordingly, I ask you to help me in securing peace and furthermore to accompany me home. I am desirous of making a campaign against Greece and need you as adviser and general.
